Document:
# STRONGHOLD-CLASS SCIENCE SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Medium
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 1-3
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Solar/Uranium
# Shuttle Brief
"The DBI Stronghold is intended for researching even the most dangerous of artifacts and anomolies, guarenteeing safety with minimal repairs needed per catastrophic explosion! with a large research lab and testing chamber the Dung Beetle Incorporated's Stronghold is sure to suffice!"
# Ship Functions
"This button opens the 3 bottom blast doors, removing the air from the chamber"
"This button closes the blast doors surrounding the artifact analyzer, providing much needed protection from artifact explosions"
"This button toggles the thrusters, allowing you to live on the solar power"
# Science
[textlink="Science" link="Science"/]
# Medical
[textlink="Medicine" link="Medical Doctor"/]
[textlink="Chemistry" link="Chemist"/]
[textlink="Chemicals" link="Chemicals"/]

[textlink="Botany" link="Botany"/]

# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Nanotrasen vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
